name: Yamato
description: Yamato, also known as Princess Oni is the daughter of the former Emperor Kaidou. Trained from a young age to be Kaidou's heir, Yamato instead developed a deep admiration for the samurai Kozuki Oden. After his death, Yamato decided to become Oden, posing as him and adopting his mannerisms.
creator: Nisiquierarroz
